queries.question: Show me all diplomas and certificates that require passing an exam.
queries.sql:
SELECT Courses.Title 
FROM Courses
WHERE (Courses.AwardProgram = "Diploma" OR Courses.AwardProgram = "Certificate") AND Courses.CompletionRequirements = "Passing Exam"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?courses a :Courses .
  ?courses p:Title ?title .
  ?courses p:AwardProgram ?awardprogram_w .
  ?courses p:AwardProgram ?awardprogram_w2 .
  ?courses p:CompletionRequirements ?completionrequirements_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?awardprogram_w) = "Diploma" || STR(?awardprogram_w2) = "Certificate")) && STR(?completionrequirements_w) = "Passing Exam"))
}
